heading: Overview
body:
The Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Base integration with Atlas
enables the following use cases:

- Use foundation models with MongoDB Vector Search
  to build AI applications and implement RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation).
  To get started, see [Get Started](amazon-bedrock-get-started).

- Enable hybrid search with MongoDB Vector Search and MongoDB Search
  for your knowledge base. To learn more, see
  [Hybrid Search with Amazon Bedrock and Atlas](bedrock-hybrid-search).
